# tfe_workspace

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `operations` (Boolean, Deprecated)

- `source_name` (String)
- `source_url` (String)
- `speculative_enabled` (Boolean)
- `ssh_key_id` (String)
- `structured_run_output_enabled` (Boolean)
- `tag_names` (Set of String)

### Read-Only

- `effective_tags` (Map of String)
- `html_url` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
